justification: Real, promoted to blocking. The gate HARD-GATE enumerates its read set (Brief/AC/Design/Tech Stack/Plan + constitution + CONTEXT) but the new check-4 clause reads the kept probe-output artifact a Tech Stack claim references — outside that declared set. Fixing by adding the referenced probe-output to the gate's read-only inputs and naming the minimal evidence shape (presence + shape only, still read-only).

Real, promoted to blocking. The techstack HARD-GATE says 'do NOT ... write code' while step 5 mandates writing/running a minimal probe script. Fixing by reconciling the HARD-GATE to exempt throwaway spike code + the durable kept probe-output artifact, while forbidding product-code/manifest/lockfile mutation.
